_comment: Google-managed BigQuery MCP server (remote, OAuth + IAM). Read-only is enforced by IAM, NOT a config flag — grant the principal only BigQuery Data Viewer + Job User and prefer the execute_sql_readonly tool (see SETUP.md). Merge: claude -> .mcp.json mcpServers, cursor -> .cursor/mcp.json mcpServers, codex_toml -> append to .codex/config.toml.
